volume-create.help:
Create volume

Usage: rama-core volume-create <NAME> [SIZE] [MOUNT] [ALGORITHM] [PRESET]

Arguments:
  <NAME>       
  [SIZE]       
  [MOUNT]      
  [ALGORITHM]  
  [PRESET]     

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

volume-list.help:
List volumes

Usage: rama-core volume-list

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

volume-backup.help:
Backup volume

Usage: rama-core volume-backup <NAME> [TARGET]

Arguments:
  <NAME>    
  [TARGET]  

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

volume-restore.help:
Restore volume

Usage: rama-core volume-restore <NAME> <SOURCE>

Arguments:
  <NAME>    
  <SOURCE>  

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

create.help:
Create a zram device

Usage: rama-core create [DEVICE] <SIZE> [ALGORITHM] [MOUNT] [PRIORITY]

Arguments:
  [DEVICE]     
  <SIZE>       
  [ALGORITHM]  
  [MOUNT]      
  [PRIORITY]   

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

reset.help:
Reset (destroy) a zram device

Usage: rama-core reset <DEVICE>

Arguments:
  <DEVICE>  

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

list.help:
List zram devices

Usage: rama-core list [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --json       Output as JSON array
  -b, --bytes      Print sizes in raw bytes instead of human-readable
      --no-header  Suppress the header row
  -h, --help       Print help

stats.help:
Show device statistics

Usage: rama-core stats [DEVICE]

Arguments:
  [DEVICE]  

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

algorithms.help:
Show available compression algorithms

Usage: rama-core algorithms

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

workspace-create.help:
Create a workspace (overlayFS on zram + tmpfs build dir)

Usage: rama-core workspace-create [OPTIONS] <SOURCE> [MOUNT] [NAME]

Arguments:
  <SOURCE>  
  [MOUNT]   
  [NAME]    

Options:
      --backing-dir <BACKING_DIR>    Directory for overlay upper/work dirs (default: /var/tmp/rama-workspaces)
  -i, --isolated                     
      --memory-limit <MEMORY_LIMIT>  
      --cpu-limit <CPU_LIMIT>        
      --build-dir <BUILD_DIR>        Build output dir name (auto-detected: target for Rust/Maven, build for CMake/Meson)
      --build-size <BUILD_SIZE>      Size of the tmpfs mounted at the build dir (default: 8G)
      --zpu-pool <ZPU_POOL>          Mount build dir on a ZPU pool (e.g. /zpu) for compressed build artifacts
  -h, --help                         Print help

workspace-destroy.help:
Destroy a workspace

Usage: rama-core workspace-destroy <TARGET>

Arguments:
  <TARGET>  

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

workspace-list.help:
List workspaces

Usage: rama-core workspace-list

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

workspace-info.help:
Show detailed info about a workspace

Usage: rama-core workspace-info [OPTIONS] <NAME>

Arguments:
  <NAME>  Workspace name

Options:
      --json  Output as JSON
  -h, --help  Print help

dev-create.help:
Create a RAM-backed dev environment

Usage: rama-core dev-create [OPTIONS] --source <SOURCE>

Options:
  -s, --source <SOURCE>  
  -n, --name <NAME>      
  -m, --mount <MOUNT>    
  -z, --zram <ZRAM>      
  -t, --tmpfs            
  -S, --size <SIZE>      
      --mode <MODE>      
      --upper <UPPER>    
      --work <WORK>      
  -n, --namespace        
  -h, --help             Print help

dev-destroy.help:
Destroy dev environment

Usage: rama-core dev-destroy <TARGET>

Arguments:
  <TARGET>  

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help

dev-list.help:
List dev environments

Usage: rama-core dev-list

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help
